message:
test: add 12 hook test files for platform, feature, and gesture hooks (bd-r3yp, bd-1b9b, bd-fsbj)

109 new tests covering usePWAInstall, useServiceWorker, useViewTransition,
useAllRatings, use-basket, useKeyboardShortcuts, useAnnounce, useOnboarding,
useSwipeGesture, useSwipeHint, useHaptic, usePrecisionHaptic.
Total: 2995 web tests (150 files), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
